title: crataegus monogyna var. dissecta
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. dissecta, also known as the hawthorn tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna var. dissecta include its high content of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and lowering the risk of heart disease due to its ability to improve blood vessel function and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Crataegus monogyna var. dissecta include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and promote overall well-being.
